things.name: Grand Place
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage medieval square, one of Europe's most beautiful, with gilded guild houses

things.name: Atomium
things.description: Iconic 102-metre structure built for Expo 58 with nine interconnected spheres and panoramic views

things.name: Manneken Pis
things.description: Brussels's beloved and irreverent 17th-century bronze statue with hundreds of costumes

things.name: Royal Museums of Fine Arts
things.description: Outstanding collection of Belgian and international art including Bruegel and Magritte

things.name: Musee Magritte
things.description: World's largest collection of works by Surrealist painter Rene Magritte

things.name: European Quarter
things.description: Heart of the European Union with the European Parliament and Council buildings

things.name: Galeries Royales Saint-Hubert
things.description: Europe's oldest covered shopping arcade from 1847 with chocolatiers and boutiques

things.name: Belgian Chocolate & Beer
things.description: Tasting tours of Belgium's world-famous chocolate makers and Trappist breweries

things.name: Cinquantenaire Park & Museums
things.description: Grand triumphal arch with art and military history museums in a magnificent park

things.name: Mini-Europe
things.description: 1:25 scale reproductions of 350 famous European monuments next to the Atomium
